name: The Falling Darkness
effectsRaw: Upgradeable - Primary Augment (Yellow Augment Slot, Blue Augment Slot, or Red Augment Slot)
Yellow Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to offensive stats, condition resistances and immunities, elemental resistances and DC spellcasting stats.
Colorless Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to ability scores and skills. Set augments are also colorless.
Blue Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to defensive stats, healing amplifications and Tactics DCs.
Red Augments: Standard augments provide bonuses to spell power, and grant elemental damage on hit and DR bypass to weapons.
Upgradeable - Secondary Augment (Green Augment Slot, Orange Augment Slot, or Purple Augment Slot)
Green Augments: All Green augments are named augments.
Orange Augments: All Orange augments are named augments.
Purple Augments: All Purple augments are named augments.
